sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current magenta positions (gameplay squares only, not top bar):
# (35-36, 16-17) - top-left (35, 16)
# (38-39, 35-36) - top-left (38, 35)
# (54-55, 45-46) - top-left (54, 45)
# (56-57, 15-16) - top-left (56, 15)

# Blue circle at (23-31, 29-37)
# Let's move the square at (38-39, 35-36) towards the blue circle
# It needs to move up and left to reach the blue circle

# First, let's move it a few times and see what happens
actions = []
# Move square at (38, 35) up-left 3 times
for i in range(3):
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 38 - i, 'col': 35 - i})

result = action(actions)

after = current_frame.segmentation
m_positions = []
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]), min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        m_positions.append(r)

print(f"Magenta positions after moving: {sorted(m_positions)}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
